title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
